title: Walk-in Drive Store Manager at Spencer's Retail Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Store Manager at Spencer's Retail Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Spencer's Retail Holdings Services invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Agra location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Spencer's Retail Holdings Services:
Spencer's Retail Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spencer's Retail Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
